# Pull Request Checklist

## What changed

- 

## Checks run

- [ ] Relevant `tests/Run-DemoCheck.ps1`
- [ ] PowerShell syntax check or GitHub Actions
- [ ] README/docs updated if run steps or output changed

## Privacy check

- [ ] No real usernames, emails, phone numbers, or user exports
- [ ] No employer names, internal domains, hostnames, IPs, tenant IDs, client IDs, or ticket numbers
- [ ] No production logs, screenshots, report exports, or raw workplace scripts
- [ ] No secrets, passwords, tokens, certificates, private keys, or `.env` values
